SaveSynapseWidgetAttachment.description: Model to use when attaching a secondary user to a primary user.

user_id.description: User's identifier in your system, must be unique.

primary_user_id.description: User id of the primary user this subscription is attached to. Must be unique and already registered as a primary user.

email.description: Email of a user. Must be unique and valid.

start_date.description: User's attachment start date. Can't be in the past.

end_date.description: User's attachment end date. Can't be before the start date, nor in the past.

SaveSynapseWidgetDetachment.description: Model to use when detaching a secondary user from a primary user.

user_id.description: User's identifier in your system, must be unique.

end_date.description: User's attachment end date. Can't be before the start date, nor in the past.
